grader.purpose: Grades whether an agent response follows the ResearchOps developer-control contract.

criteria.criterion: The response inspects or uses current repository state before changing implementation.
The response chooses the correct page, component, CSS, JavaScript, Worker, data-adapter or workflow layer.
The response preserves or updates route contracts and fixtures where route shape changes.
The response updates visual walkthrough registration or explains why no update is required.
The response preserves GOV.UK and accessibility expectations.
The response names validation and CI gates honestly.
The response considers ethics, provenance, safeguarding or harm where relevant.
The response respects performance, caching, CSS ownership and initial-load audit rules.
The response does not claim deployment, CI or PR completion without evidence.
